title: CPvP Vantage
description: This pack includes Crystal PvP Essentials, designed to sharpen your skills and help get better in CPvP
body:
## 👑 The Ultimate Crystal PvP Experience

This pack is engineered for maximum performance and absolute clarity during stressing situations. Whether you're grinding **Tierlist fights, practicing rekits, or playing survival PvP**, this pack adds every important PvP//CPvP essentials, so you can focus on the win.



## 💎 Pack Highlights

### ⚔️ Optimized For

* **Tierlist Fights & Dels:** Maximum response for competitive duels.
* **Drain & Eval:** Clearer visuals to track your opponent.
* **Survival & Rekits:** Stable performance in any environment.
* **All CPvP Styles:** Built for the modern crystal meta.

### 🎯 Visual Enhancements

* **Minimal Distractions:** Stripped-back visuals for pure focus.
* **Small Totem Pops:** Reduced animation size to keep your view clear.
* **Low Fire:** Minimal screen coverage when burning.
* **No Explosions Particles:** Removed explosion particles to eliminate visual clutter.
* **Tiny Pop Particles:** Discreet feedback without the mess.

### ⚡ Performance & FPS

* **FPS Boost:** Highly optimized textures for maximum FPS.
* **Visual Efficiency:** Smooth rendering even during heavy fighting.



###  ** ALL THIS WHILE KEEPING THE GAME AS VANILLA LOOKING AS POSSIBLE **
